data.title: ADM is streamlining its soy protein production network to enhance efficiency and serve customers better. They will leverage their Decatur facility and other global sites.
data.description: ADM (NYSE: ADM) revealed plans to optimize its global soy protein production network to boost efficiency and cater better to customers globally. The company aims to leverage the operational excellence of its Decatur, Illinois plant alongside other facilities worldwide. This initiative is part of ADM's strategy to enhance service quality for customers while maximizing operational capabilities.

data.title: Ethereum's price drops below $4,400 as 1M ETH to be withdrawn from staking amid rising publicly traded treasuries.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum has experienced a more significant decline compared to other digital currencies in the market. This drop coincides with a significant event where approximately 1 million ETH is scheduled to be removed from staking.
Max Miller, a member of Congress, has recently revealed undisclosed stock transactions.

data.title: Leggett & Platt sells Aerospace Products Group, updates 2025 guidance. Transaction completed with Tinicum Incorporated.
data.description: Leggett & Platt, based in Carthage, Missouri, revealed on August 29, 2025, that it has finalized the sale of its Aerospace Products Group to funds managed by Tinicum Incorporated. This successful transaction will likely impact the company's full year 2025 guidance. The details regarding the financial aspects and effects of the sale were not disclosed.
